data.body:
Closing: the two wall-clock reductions the investigation identified are both live on main.
1) CI test threading raised to 4 — .github/workflows/_build-and-test.yml runs 'pytest -n 4' (ubuntu) / '-n 3' (macos) with pytest-xdist (story 8d36-a15a-fcbd-4ebd, epic ce0e-f618-a2a4-4ee4, both closed; landed via commit 88cc31390, reachable from HEAD). Investigation measured this at ~5x (1361s -> 331-351s), byte-identical outcomes.
2) Signature/identity-verification gate optimized — the gerrit-verify.yaml 'verify-identity (whole-store authorship gate)' job (gerrit-verify.yaml:183-245) was the 63-min hotspot; bug a2c7-c9a9-ed63-4c5a batched era-verify commit resolution (verify_authorship_at_commit via build_position_commit_map), landed in commit 5ce636f21 (reachable from HEAD) with perf regression test tests/unit/test_verify_identity_a2c7_perf.py. Both fixes reachable from HEAD; operator confirmed these are the intended resolution.
